name: Whatsit
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onion slowly while cooking the noodles.
2. When all ingredients are cooked, add the cheese to the meat mixture.
3. Stir in the noodles until the cheese melts.
4. Add the soups and mix slightly.
5. Pour the contents into a baking dish.
6. Cover with cracker crumbs.
7. Dot with butter and brown before serving.
